meaning: n.为死者所诵的晚祷词,安慰剂
examples: Like any placebo, it must be dispensed with authority to be effective.
We can, perhaps, attribute mediocre results to an inadequate placebo effect.
We performed a double-blind, multicenter study, comparing MMX mesalamine vs placebo for the treatment of active ulcerative colitis.
The study showed virtually the same symptoms among mycoprotein eaters and a placebo group.
Not all of the placebo treatments that the researchers looked at in this study are inert.
